providers.name: GitHub
providers.description: Source control, issues, pull requests, and developer workflows.
providers.notes: Current managed connector works with bearer tokens today; GitHub OAuth is a strong candidate for a future one-click connect flow.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the authenticated GitHub user profile.

providers.name: Google Docs
providers.description: Docs authoring and Google Workspace document automation.
providers.notes: Current managed connector accepts a Google access token manually; a full OAuth connect flow can remove token copy/paste.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch a Google Docs document by ID.

providers.name: Slack
providers.description: Channels, messaging, workflows, canvases, and operational collaboration.
providers.notes: Uses Slack's official hosted MCP server with confidential OAuth user-token auth.

providers.name: Notion
providers.description: Workspace search, pages, databases, and knowledge management.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Search pages and databases in the connected Notion workspace.

providers.name: Figma
providers.description: Design files, nodes, and developer handoff automation.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch a Figma file by key.

providers.name: Google Drive
providers.description: File search, metadata, folders, and document discovery.
providers.notes: Natural expansion of the Google Workspace surface beyond Google Docs.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Drive files visible to the connected user.

providers.name: Google Sheets
providers.description: Spreadsheet reads, writes, formulas, and reporting workflows.
providers.notes: High-value automation surface for agent-driven reporting and structured edits.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch spreadsheet metadata and sheets by ID.

providers.name: Gmail
providers.description: Mailbox search, drafting, sending, and thread triage.
providers.notes: Popular agent workflow target for inbox triage and drafting.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Gmail messages for the authenticated user.

providers.name: Google Calendar
providers.description: Calendar search, event scheduling, and meeting coordination.
providers.notes: Strong personal productivity use case with mature OAuth flows.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List events from the user's primary Google Calendar.

providers.name: Jira
providers.description: Issue tracking, sprint workflows, and engineering program management.
providers.notes: Very common MCP target for software teams and ticket automation.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Jira projects available to the connected user.

providers.name: Confluence
providers.description: Wiki pages, spaces, and internal documentation search.
providers.notes: Natural companion to Jira for software teams.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Confluence spaces available to the connected user.

providers.name: Linear
providers.description: Issue tracking, roadmap planning, and product engineering workflows.
providers.notes: Popular among modern product engineering teams and already useful to this repo's users.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Query issues from Linear via GraphQL.

providers.name: Asana
providers.description: Task management, projects, and work tracking.
providers.notes: Broad business adoption and straightforward OAuth app model.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List tasks visible to the connected Asana user.

providers.name: Trello
providers.description: Boards, cards, checklists, and lightweight project planning.
providers.notes: Useful for SMB and cross-functional task boards, but Trello's public API auth is a special-case flow rather than a straightforward generic OAuth2 connector.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Trello boards visible to the authenticated member.

providers.name: ClickUp
providers.description: Tasks, docs, goals, and workflow automation.
providers.notes: Large install base and broad operations coverage.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List ClickUp workspaces available to the connected user.

providers.name: Monday.com
providers.description: Boards, automations, and work management across teams.
providers.notes: High-demand operations platform with rich board APIs.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Query boards from Monday.com.

providers.name: Airtable
providers.description: Bases, records, linked data, and workflow automation.
providers.notes: Very common internal-tools and operations automation surface.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Airtable bases the connected user granted access to.

providers.name: Dropbox
providers.description: Cloud files, folders, content access, and sharing.
providers.notes: Popular file automation target with mature OAuth support.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List entries in the root Dropbox folder.

providers.name: Box
providers.description: Enterprise file storage, metadata, and collaboration.
providers.notes: Strong enterprise document-management footprint.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List files and folders in the Box root folder.

providers.name: Microsoft Outlook
providers.description: Mail, calendar, contacts, and meeting workflows through Microsoft Graph.
providers.notes: High-value Microsoft Graph integration surface for enterprise users.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Outlook messages for the signed-in user.

providers.name: Microsoft Teams
providers.description: Chats, channels, meetings, and collaboration via Microsoft Graph.
providers.notes: Common enterprise chat target alongside Outlook.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Microsoft Teams joined by the signed-in user.

providers.name: OneDrive
providers.description: Cloud file access and document workflows through Microsoft Graph.
providers.notes: Useful for enterprise file automation and search.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List OneDrive items in the root folder.

providers.name: SharePoint
providers.description: Sites, document libraries, lists, and intranet content.
providers.notes: Frequently requested for enterprise knowledge retrieval.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the SharePoint root site through Microsoft Graph.

providers.name: Salesforce
providers.description: CRM records, accounts, opportunities, and sales operations.
providers.notes: Very common enterprise CRM and agent-assist target.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Salesforce accounts from the connected org.

providers.name: HubSpot
providers.description: CRM, marketing, tickets, and customer lifecycle workflows.
providers.notes: Uses HubSpot's official remote MCP server plus MCP auth apps with PKCE.

registrationDefaults.credentialHelp: Use the client ID and secret from a HubSpot MCP auth app (Development → MCP Auth Apps). Standard HubSpot OAuth apps and private apps will not authenticate with mcp.hubspot.com.

errorHints.401: HubSpot MCP requires a user-level OAuth token from a HubSpot MCP auth app. Reconnect HubSpot with an MCP auth app instead of a standard HubSpot OAuth app or private app.
errorHints.403: HubSpot MCP may need reauthorization to grant the current server tool scopes. Disconnect and reconnect HubSpot, then try discovery again.

providers.name: Zendesk
providers.description: Support tickets, customers, agents, and help desk operations.
providers.notes: Strong support automation use case for agents.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Zendesk tickets for the connected account.

providers.name: Intercom
providers.description: Customer support, conversations, inboxes, and CRM context.
providers.notes: Useful for customer-facing assistant workflows.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Intercom contacts for the connected workspace.

providers.name: Stripe
providers.description: Payments, customers, invoices, and subscription operations.
providers.notes: High-value fintech automation target with mature OAuth patterns.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Stripe customers from the connected account.

providers.name: Shopify
providers.description: Storefronts, products, orders, and ecommerce operations.
providers.notes: A top ecommerce platform and strong MCP candidate.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Shopify products for the connected store.

providers.name: Discord
providers.description: Guilds, channels, messages, and community operations.
providers.notes: Useful for community automation and bot-assisted workflows.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Discord guilds available to the connected user.

providers.name: Zoom
providers.description: Meetings, recordings, webinars, and scheduling operations.
providers.notes: Frequently requested for scheduling and meeting summaries.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Zoom meetings for the connected user.

providers.name: Webflow
providers.description: CMS items, sites, and web publishing workflows.
providers.notes: Uses Webflow's official hosted MCP server and deployment-scoped MCP OAuth registration so each user can authorize their own sites and workspaces.

providers.name: Miro
providers.description: Whiteboards, diagrams, notes, and workshop collaboration.
providers.notes: Strong visual collaboration target for design and product teams.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Miro boards available to the connected user.

providers.name: Canva
providers.description: Design content, brand assets, and marketing collateral workflows.
providers.notes: Broad creator and marketing adoption with OAuth-based apps.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Canva designs available to the connected user.

providers.name: Datadog
providers.description: Logs, metrics, monitors, incidents, and observability workflows.
providers.notes: Uses Datadog's official hosted MCP server. The default registration targets the US1 endpoint and can be edited for other Datadog sites.

providers.name: Sentry
providers.description: Errors, releases, issue ownership, and incident investigation.
providers.notes: Natural target for engineering support agents.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Sentry organizations available to the connected user.

providers.name: PostHog
providers.description: Product analytics, feature flags, and session insights.
providers.notes: Relevant for product analytics and experimentation workflows.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List PostHog projects available to the connected user.

providers.name: Supabase
providers.description: Projects, databases, auth, and storage administration.
providers.notes: Popular developer platform with broad automation value and a documented management-API OAuth integration flow.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Supabase projects available to the connected user.

providers.name: Vercel
providers.description: Deployments, projects, domains, and preview environment workflows.
providers.notes: Especially relevant to this repo's deployment model.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Vercel projects available to the connected user.

providers.name: Netlify
providers.description: Sites, builds, deploy previews, and web operations.
providers.notes: Common alternative hosting/deployment automation target.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Netlify sites available to the connected user.

providers.name: Plaid
providers.description: Financial account connectivity and transaction data flows.
providers.notes: Strong fintech workflow candidate, although much of Plaid's OAuth guidance is a special-case token exchange rather than a generic end-user SaaS OAuth connector.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch accounts for a connected Plaid item.

providers.name: Okta
providers.description: Identity, users, applications, and access administration.
providers.notes: High-value admin and security automation surface.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Okta users for the connected org.

providers.name: ServiceNow
providers.description: Tickets, incidents, service catalogs, and enterprise workflows.
providers.notes: Strong enterprise IT operations use case.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List ServiceNow incidents for the connected instance.

providers.name: Freshdesk
providers.description: Support tickets, customer records, and help desk workflows.
providers.notes: Popular support platform for SMB and mid-market teams.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Freshdesk tickets for the connected account.

providers.name: Pipedrive
providers.description: Deals, contacts, and sales pipeline management.
providers.notes: Common CRM choice with solid OAuth story.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Pipedrive people visible to the connected user.

providers.name: Mailchimp
providers.description: Campaigns, audiences, automations, and email marketing.
providers.notes: Popular marketing automation target.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Mailchimp audiences for the connected account.

providers.name: QuickBooks
providers.description: Accounting, invoices, customers, and financial operations.
providers.notes: Frequent finance automation request with OAuth-based apps.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Query QuickBooks customers for the connected company.

providers.name: Xero
providers.description: Accounting, contacts, invoices, and bookkeeping workflows.
providers.notes: Important accounting platform in many regions.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: List Xero contacts for the connected tenant.

providers.name: GitLab
providers.description: Repositories, issues, merge requests, pipelines, and DevSecOps.
providers.notes: Major Git hosting platform and natural expansion beyond GitHub.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the authenticated GitLab user profile.

providers.name: Bitbucket
providers.description: Repositories, pull requests, and Atlassian engineering workflows.
providers.notes: Popular in Atlassian-centric teams and complements Jira/Confluence.

registrationDefaults.toolDescription: Fetch the authenticated Bitbucket user profile.

providers.name: ElevenLabs
providers.description: Text to speech, voices, transcription, audio generation, and agents.
providers.notes: Official API-key connector backed by ElevenLabs' published OpenAPI spec.

registrationDefaults.credentialHelp: Personal or workspace ElevenLabs API key sent in the xi-api-key header.

providers.name: Ordinal
providers.description: Social media posts, profiles, analytics, labels, approvals, and engagements.
providers.notes: Official MCP server backed by Ordinal's API with API-key (Bearer) auth.

registrationDefaults.credentialHelp: API key from your Ordinal workspace settings, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

defaultManagedConnectors.name: ElevenLabs
defaultManagedConnectors.description: Text to speech, voices, transcription, audio generation, and agents.
defaultManagedConnectors.credentialHelp: Personal or workspace ElevenLabs API key sent in the xi-api-key header.

defaultManagedConnectors.name: Ordinal
defaultManagedConnectors.description: Social media posts, profiles, analytics, labels, approvals, and engagements.
defaultManagedConnectors.credentialHelp: API key from your Ordinal workspace settings, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
